case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. MARIA D AYALA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-11-2017 CONTINUED TO SEP-12-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-11-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYALA, MARIA D $3,769.70 PRINCIPAL, $340.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,110.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17226006)
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, MARIA D
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100025039) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, MARIA D
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-11-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17087057), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE SERVED MAR-23-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, MARIA D
DECLARATION RE: RESEARCH TO DETERMINE MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT; NOTICE TO PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (B) (2) (TRANSACTION ID # 17226006) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $25.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100044435) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, MARIA D DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-21-2017
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17226006) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE SERVED MAR-23-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, MARIA D

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $340.60 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 17226006) AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, MARIA D
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-12-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
